task_description: Apply the ATELIER visual refresh across the ZeroUpload site: new oklch design tokens (Porcelain light + Vault dark palettes), Geist/Geist Mono fonts, brass accent, component upgrades (glow drop zone, quick-chips, icon tool cards, hover-lift, dark mode toggle), and update the brand skill to document Atelier as the source of truth.

verification.summary: npm registry is blocked by proxy (403 Forbidden) and node_modules are incomplete, preventing npm run build. Code verified by manual review: all imports resolve, token names are consistent, no references to undefined utilities, ToolGrid prop interface matches usage across all pages. No engine files were touched. Build validation must happen on Cloudflare Preview after push.
